name: rbi-cms-portal-mock
description: Mock RBI CMS Portal — receives forwarded complaints into the bank's Crest grievance agent and accepts the bank's resolution callback.

endpoints_used.purpose: Bank posts back final resolution to RBI

notes: Add this connection to the bank's Crest grievance agent as 'rbi-cms-callback'.
Wire it into Node 13 or Node 14 (Notification) so that the bank-side agent informs RBI when the customer letter is sent.

The bo-portal-api connection placeholder in the original cgio_agent_crest.json is the inbound side: that's what the Trigger receives when RBI POSTs to the Crest agent. This connection is the outbound side: bank → RBI.
